title: JelliPack
description: JelliPack is a 16x resource pack for Minecraft 1.20.4 which changes the design of all the basic tools (Sword, Axe, Pickaxe etc.) along with other miscellaneous items (like ores and coal). In the future I will add more and more items.
body: JelliPack is a 16x resource pack which changes the design of all the basic tools in the game (Sword, Axe, Pickaxe etc), aiming to provide an enhanced survival experience. Though the pack is not going to end there. I'm planning to complete the pack eventually. I hope you support me on my journey :)
